sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66206" key="melw|diko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελῳδ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n66206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">by means of melody</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πειθώ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:2:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
